channel.title: transaction on Xing Lin
channel.description: Recent content in transaction on Xing Lin

item.title: Transaction
item.description: The four properties that a transaction in the database world has are ACID: A stands for atomicity, C for consistency, I for isolation and D for durability. Property Definition Technique to achieve that property Atomicity A transaction either succeeds or fails as a single operation. Undo log Consistency A database should start in a consistent state and end in another consistent state, after applying a transaction or transactions.

item.title: Transaction
item.description: The four properties that a transaction in the database world has are ACID: A stands for atomicity, C for consistency, I for isolation and D for durability. | Property | Definition | Technique to achieve that property | | :——: | :–:| | Atomicity| A transaction either succeeds or fails as a single operation. | Undo log | | Consistency | A database should start in a consistent state and end in another consistent state, after applying a transaction or transactions.
